use_cases: Navigation menus with animated squiggly underlines for visual link selection feedback
Interactive header navigation with smooth animated transitions between items
Tab-style navigation with distinctive animated underlines
ai_summary: A navigation component featuring animated squiggly underlines that draw smoothly when links are selected, using Framer Motion's layoutId and strokeDashoffset animations for a hand-drawn wave effect. Supports hover states and click-based selection for interactive navigation menus.
